expectations.evidence: Shows 'export ZENDNNL_MATMUL_ALGO=1' with explanation of Blocked AOCL DLP

expectations.text: Recommends BF16 format as ideal for ZenDNN on Zen 5
expectations.evidence: Explains BF16 is supported by ZenDNN and references AVX-512 BF16 instructions

expectations.text: Recommends using physical core count (16 cores) for thread count
expectations.evidence: Recommends '-t 16' matching physical core count, notes SMT threads rarely help
